text.title: Regulated Incident Response Protocol Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Regulated Incident Response Protocol output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: regulatory_scope populated with a typed value
clock_table populated with a typed value
isolation_runbook_url populated with a typed value
compliance_officer_contact populated with a typed value
comm_templates populated with a typed value
counsel_review_required populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
